---
title: "Mr Fielder"
---

## Mr Fielder

### Description

perhaps a curate at Hursley

### Biography

The person mentioned (15 Jan 1853) may be the same as the Mr Fielder, apparently a clergyman somewhere else, letter to him (1870) thanking for collection for Melanesia.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 8th	1870 [corrected from 1869]
- Letter from January 15, 1853.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
